content: In the "unified theory of generalized multicategories" paper by cruttwell and shulman it is claimed that if a virtual double category has all units then for any vertical 1-cell f there is an associated 2-cell U_f between the horizontal units. How is this defined?
It must be some kind of creative appeal to the definition of opcartesian but I don't get it
I got tripped up on this once myself. The answer is in this thread.
